examples: I want nothing but raiment and daily bread.
There'd be a merry contrast betwixt my glory and my raiment!
This is he who had never known aught but rags for raiment, kicks for comfort, and offal for diet!
He wears the crisp white shirts and dark blazers that have replaced tweed as the raiment of the academic caste.
Jesus came not as the expected earthly King adorned in fine raiment sitting on a throne but as an innocent baby in a stable amid the dust and grime of first century Palestine.
